text:
No matter where you are is the 2nd character image song for the Attack on Titan anime. It is the character image song of Mikasa Ackermann, and is sung by her voice actress, . It is an arrangement of the song Call your name.

The song was composed by both and Kohta Yamamoto, and arranged solely by Yamamoto.
